title: taraxacum brachyoncum
intro: Taraxacum brachyoncum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus, closely related to the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant is rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron, providing various health benefits such as improving liver function, reducing blood pressure, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum brachyoncum can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
